steps.assistant_text: Triple-call wrapper over gl_func_00000000. Three distinct USO-placeholder symbols: two are dereferenced (lw a0, 0x30(a0) delay slot) to read a field at SYM+0x30; the third passes the symbol's address directly (addiu a0, a0, 0 delay slot). Used unique-named externs (D_00000000, D_mgr_B20_1, D_mgr_B20_2) all mapped to 0x0 in undefined_syms_auto.txt so each jal gets its own reloc pair.

metadata.verification: Byte-exact match via project build; verified with objdump diff against expected/
